title: Traceboard Incident Timeline Landing Page
topic: Build a polished one-page landing page for an incident timeline debugger called Traceboard.
prompt: Build a polished one-page landing page for Traceboard, an incident timeline debugger for engineering teams. The first viewport should make the product and audience clear. Include navigation, a strong hero, feature sections, a workflow section, accessible calls to action, and responsive styling. Use a real app-like visual or generated asset instead of decorative placeholder boxes. Keep the page usable as a static Vite React app.
successCriteria: The page renders without console errors on desktop and mobile.
The first viewport clearly communicates Traceboard and incident timeline debugging.
Navigation and calls to action are keyboard accessible.
The visual design is polished, dense enough for technical buyers, and avoids generic template patterns.
Responsive layout has no horizontal overflow at 390px width.
